title: calycophysum villosum
intro: Calycophysum villosum, also known as the hairy calycophysum, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Loganiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calycophysum villosum include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from pain and swelling. Calycophysum villosum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
